stemHtml: When cargo, unaccompanied baggage or stores were not unloaded at their intended destination but instead were unloaded at a different international airport, the Contracting State where the unloading takes place, if satisfied that there is a valid reason for the change...

options.a: shall not impose penalties, fines and taxes but may impose custom duties on the operator.
options.b: shall not impose penalties and fines but may impose customs duties and taxes on the operator.
options.c: shall not impose penalties, fines, customs duties and taxes on the operator.
options.d: shall not impose penalties, fines and custom duties but may impose taxes on the operator.
